headerDisplay: Exposes Trane / American Standard thermostats (XL824, XL850, XL950, XL1050) to Apple Home via the Nexia cloud API. One-time setup: log into your brand's web portal (tranehome.com / mynexia.com / asairhome.com), add a Mobile Device to get a 12-digit activation code, then run `npx nexia-activate <code>` to obtain the Mobile ID and API Key below. [Full instructions](https://github.com/drewan50/homebridge-trane-nexia#step-1--get-credentials).

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Obtained alongside Mobile ID from the activation step.

houseId.title: House ID
houseId.description: Optional. If empty, the plugin will discover it from the /session endpoint.

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll Nexia for state. Lower = snappier Home app, more cloud requests.

apiUrl.title: API base URL override
apiUrl.description: Advanced. Leave blank to use the brand's default. Useful only if the vendor moves the host again.
